title: Conversion/Switch of Government of India Securities
description: Government of India announces the conversion/switch of its securities through auction for an aggregate amount of ₹20,000 crore (face value). The security-wise details of the conversion/switch are given as under: Date of Auction Source Securities Amount (FV) of Source Securities (in ₹ crore) Destination Securities March 09, 2026 (Monday) 6.97% GS 2026 (Maturing on Sep 06, 2026) 2,000 7.50% GS 2034 (Maturing on Aug 10, 2034) 6.97% GS 2026 (Maturing on Sep 06, 2026) 2,000 8.32% GS 2032
